chapter_title.ar: باب فَضْلِ لَحْمِ الضَّأْنِ عَلَى الْمَعْزِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 57 – Preference of meat of the lamb over the goat

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/130)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/130)
text: قُلْتُ لِأَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) إِنَّ أَهْلَ بَيْتِي لَا يَأْكُلُونَ لَحْمَ الضَّأْنِ قَالَ فَقَالَ وَ لِمَ قَالَ قُلْتُ إِنَّهُمْ يَقُولُونَ إِنَّهُ يُهَيِّجُ بِهِمُ الْمِرَّةَ السَّوْدَاءَ وَ الصُّدَاعَ وَ الْأَوْجَاعَ فَقَالَ لِي يَا سَعْدُ فَقُلْتُ لَبَّيْكَ قَالَ لَوْ عَلِمَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ شَيْئاً أَكْرَمَ مِنَ الضَّأْنِ لَفَدَى بِهِ إِسْمَاعِيلَ ( عليه السلام ) .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Sa’ad Bin Sa’ad who said,

‘I said to Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup>, ‘My family are not eating meat of the goat’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘And why?’ I said, ‘They are saying that it stirs the bitterness with them, and the black bile (acidity), and the headaches, and the pains’. So he<sup>asws</sup> said to me: ‘O Sa’ad!’ So I said, ‘At your service!’ He<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Had Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Known of a thing more prestigious than the lamb He<sup>azwj</sup> would have Sacrificed it for Ismail<sup>as</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from Sa‘d ibn Sa‘d who has said the following: “I once said to abu al-Hassan, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, ‘My family does not like the meat of sheep.’ He (the Imam) then asked, ‘Why do they not like it?’ I replied, ‘They say that it accelerates bitterness, headache and pains.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘O Sa‘d.’ I replied, ‘Yes, my Imam.’ He (the Imam) said, ‘Had Allah, most Majestic, most Glorious, considered anything more revered than sheep He would have presented it instead ( of the ram) as ransom for Tsma‘il, ‘Alayhi al-Salam.’”
